arts.ttl: Millwall keeper ‘sensational’ as penalty save tops of performance in FA Cup win at Leeds United
arts.sum: The last game he played as well, away at Portsmouth, he was excellent. Alex Neil hailed stand-in goalkeeper Liam Roberts’ “sensational” display in the wake of Millwall’s 2-0 win over Leeds in the FA Cup today.
Leeds United and Millwall condemn "tragedy chanting" that took place during Saturday's FA Cup tie between the two clubs at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke admission about Leeds line-up speaks volumes as duo grab attention
arts.sum: Even Farke admitted after full-time that the number of changes to his side disrupted the rhythm of the team and was not about to point the finger at anybody because of this. Daniel Farke was very diplomatic after full-time, outlining his disappointment while exuding the feeling that the cup exit was not the end of the world.

arts.ttl: Farke says health comes before football as tragedy chanting in Millwall loss
arts.sum: Daniel Farke spoke of football's values after Leeds condemned "vile" tragedy chanting by Millwall fans during their side's 2-0 FA Cup fourth-round victory at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: 'Entirely unacceptable' - Millwall 'appalled' by tragedy chanting heard in Leeds United clash - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Millwall have issued a strongly-worded statement in relation to allegations of tragedy chanting during their FA Cup win at Leeds United this afternoon. "The club strongly condemns all forms of football tragedy abuse and is appalled to receive reports of such chanting from a minority at today's Emirates FA Cup fixture against Leeds United.

arts.ttl: ‘Threat’ Femi Azeez earns post-match plaudits as Millwall dump Leeds out of FA Cup
arts.sum: Alex Neil singled out Femi Azeez after the winger bagged both goals in Millwall’s impressive 2-0 win over Leeds in the FA Cup. The Lions boss said: “[Azeez] can get the ball in deep areas and take us all the way up the pitch.

arts.ttl: Leeds United hit by triple injury scare as Daniel Farke delivers Millwall FA Cup verdict
arts.sum: Boss Daniel Farke has expressed his disappointment over Leeds United being dumped out of the FA Cup by Millwall. A brace either side of half-time from Femi Azeez's dumped them out of the FA Cup. Azeez opened the scoring in the 30th minute, seeing his right foot drive from long range take a wicked deflection to wrong-foot Karl Darlow.

arts.ttl: Leeds United release statement condemning 'vile chants' during FA Cup loss to Millwall
arts.sum: Leeds United have released a statement condemning "vile" tragedy chanting by Millwall supporters following their FA Cup fourth round clash at Elland Road this afternoon. A Whites statement read: "During today’s FA Cup fourth round tie with Millwall, we were extremely disappointed to hear vile chants relating to football tragedies from the away section at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Azeez double gives Millwall shock win at Leeds
arts.sum: Watch highlights as a Femi Azeez brace gives Millwall a shock win over Championship leaders Leeds United to reach the fifth round of the FA Cup for the first time since 2019.

arts.ttl: Leeds release statement as Millwall supporters accused of vile chants during FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Millwall won away at Leeds United to move into the fifth round of the FA Cup but the match at Elland Road was marred by accusations of vile chants from some supporters
